mapper.update: UPDATE sys_outbox_event SET aggregate_type = #{aggregateType}, aggregate_id = #{aggregateId}, event_type = #{eventType}, payload = #{payload}::jsonb, status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, max_retry = #{maxRetry}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, sent_time = #{sentTime}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE sys_outbox_event SET status = 'SENT', sent_time = #{sentTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_outbox_event SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_outbox_event SET retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_time = #{nextRetryTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
